Name: SearchScopeCS
Title: Search Scope CodeSystem
Description: Valid locations within a FHIR Search Result where resources are found. Used by ViewJoinMap to specify where to look for pivot and joined resources.

Name: ViewTypeCS
Title: UI Component Types
Description: Formal codes for identifying UI component factories in the KMP ViewRegistry. Each code maps to a registered ComponentRenderer that knows how to render a specific FHIR-derived view state on screen.
